# web

> A mind-palace app built with TanStack Start, Jotai, and IndexedDB. Deployed static to GitHub Pages.

## What this is

web is a small app scaffolded from the mind-palace template. SPA + full prerender via TanStack Start, all state in IndexedDB via Jotai's `atomWithIDB`, no backend.

## Architecture (inherited from mind-palace)

1. Storybook-first — every component ships with a sibling `*.stories.tsx`.
2. Zod-first types — props, atom values, IDB records, env vars, and route params start as `z.object({...})`.
3. IDB-first state — IndexedDB is the source of truth; Jotai caches it in memory.
4. CLI-gate-first — `bun run check` is the single quality gate; any warning is a failure.

## Stack

Bun 1.3.13 • TypeScript 7 • TanStack Start (SPA + prerender) • React 19 + Compiler • Tailwind v4 • anime.js v4 • PixiJS v8 • Jotai • idb • Zod 4 • Vite PWA + Workbox.

## Documentation

See the parent monorepo's CLAUDE.md and README.md for the architectural spec and operator's manual.
